channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Possible US indictment of former Cuban president Raul Castro in coming days: Sources
item.description: The U.S. may announce a criminal indictment of former Cuban president Raul Castro in the coming days, sources said.

item.title: Long Island Rail Road workers strike after contract negotiations fail
item.description: The strike, the first for the LIRR since 1994, began after the MTA and unions representing 3,500 workers could not reach an agreement.

item.title: Death penalty possible in Murdaugh murder retrial, prosecutors say
item.description: Prosecutors may seek the death penalty in the retrial of Alex Murdaugh, the South Carolina Attorney General stated.

item.title: DOJ to establish 'Truth and Justice Commission' for ally compensation: Sources
item.description: The DOJ is finalizing a deal to create a commission to pay claims from alleged victims of government weaponization, sources say.
